nasb.text: Moses and Aaron were among His priests, And Samuel was among those who called on His name; They called upon the Lord and He answered them.

esv.text: Moses and Aaron were among his priests, Samuel also was among those who called upon his name. They called to the Lord, and he answered them.

cnv.text: 在他的祭司中有摩西和亞倫， 在求告他名的人中有撒母耳； 他們求告耶和華， 他就應允他們。

ccb.text: 祂的祭司中有摩西和亚伦， 呼求祂的人中有撒母耳。 他们求告耶和华， 祂就应允他们。

csbs.text: 在他的祭司中有摩西和亚伦， 在呼求他名的人中有撒母耳， 他们向耶和华呼求，他就回应他们。
